付款
安全交易
您的交易安全无忧
我们努力保护您的安全和隐私。我们的付款安全系统会在传输过程中对您的信息进行加密。我们不会与第三方卖家分享您的信用卡详细信息，也不会向他人出售您的信息。 了解更多信息

产品包装
自有包装发货
自有包装发货

此商品已经过测试，证明它可以使用自有包装盒或包装袋进行安全运输，从而避免不必要的包装。自 2015 年以来，此计划以及其他方面的举措已帮助我们将每批配送货件的出库包装重量平均减少了 43%，节省的包装材料总重量已超过 300 万吨。

如果您仍需要此商品使用亚马逊包装，请在结账时选择“添加亚马逊包装”。 了解更多信息

      Global Recycled Standard

      Global Recycled Standard

      Global Recycled Standard (GRS) 认证商品含有可回收成分，这些成分在供应链的每个阶段（从来源到最终商品）都经过独立验证且符合社会、环境和化学要求。 购买 Global Recycled Standard (GRS) 认证的商品，支持在供应链中使用可回收材料。 商品必须含有至少 50% 的经认证的 GRS 材料，才有资格获得 Climate Pledge Friendly 标签。

      类型 沙发床

      查看更多

      关于该商品

      • 多功能折叠沙发床:折叠沙发床既可作为舒适的沙发,又可作为方便的床,非常适合小空间或客房使用。 可折叠设计,节省空间。 适合阅读、看电视、玩视频游戏或午睡
      • 头枕和腰枕:头枕和腰枕套装旨在提供卓越的舒适和支撑,无论坐着还是躺着,都能提供奢华的体验。 头枕采用绑带和搭扣设计,确保安全稳定地固定在折叠沙发上,有效防止任何不必要的移位或移位。 腰枕支撑下背部的自然曲线,缓解长时间坐着时的不适感
      • 【舒适的泡沫碎片填充物】垫子采用碎泡沫填充,精心制作,为您提供卓越的舒适度和支撑力。 这款创新的填充物可贴合您的身体轮廓,提供个性化的缓冲,缓解压力点,促进放松
      • 耐用面料:采用优质有线面料制成,这种材料提供独特的视觉和触觉体验,提升您的生活空间。 折叠沙发床的尺寸约为33.5英寸 x 74.8英寸 (约83.9 厘米 x 194.8 厘米),为一人提供舒适的座椅或床。
      • 重要提示:椅子床采用压缩和真空密封,以减少运输过程中的空间和二氧化碳排放。 打开包装后,让沙发床呼吸 48 小时,以恢复原来的形状和尺寸
      › 查看更多商品信息

      商品描述

      Previous page

      1. As A Sofa Couch

        Designed with comfort of use in mind, there is plenty of space whether sitting or lying down, providing a cozy place to lounge.

      2. As Folding Sofa

        Based on actual needs, it can serve multiple purposes, such as a reading sofa in a lounge area.Comfort provides relaxation during leisure time.

      3. As Unfolding Bed

        When the need for rest or a nap arises, it can be easily transformed into a comfortable bed with simple operations.

      10. Looking Ahead with MAXYOYO

        From individuals to quality-conscious families, from sleep health enthusiasts to home decor creators, our versatile products cater to versatile needs and lifestyles. Our styles and colors are not just decorative accents but also embellishments that add excitement to your journey. We are eagerly anticipating the opportunity to create even more delightful moments together.

      买家评论和评级的运作方式

      买家评论（包括商品星级评定）可帮助买家进一步了解商品，并确定商品是否适合他们。

      在计算整体星级评定和按星级划分的百分比时，我们不使用简单的平均值。我们的系统会考虑评论的时间以及评论者是否在亚马逊上购买了商品等因素。系统还对评论进行了分析，以验证其可信度。

      详细了解买家评论在亚马逊上的运作方式

      Amazon Customer
      5 星（最高 5 星）
      Great value, good quality.
      I live in a small studio unit in Honolulu and have a very limited space, lowkey this is one of the best purchase ever… because Amazon prime is the best thing in the world, it was delivered right in front of my door so I took the box in, opened the box and the sofa just popped out of the box, left it for a couple of hours and there it was. I have a family coming to visit from the mainland so needed to find a single sofa bed so I could use it as a mattress but also as a sofa when I’m home and it’s super comfortable and quality is great. It was so easy and seating feels comfortable, length + size perfect for any space. Highly recommended especially for single people
      更多隐藏

      • Alanis crespo
        5.0 颗星，最多 5 颗星 Comfy space-saver — best for one person
        2026年2月19日在美国发布评论
        尺寸: 單人座颜色: 深灰色已确认购买
        Comfy space-saver — best for one person
        The MAXYOYO Folding Sofa Bed is a cozy and versatile option if you need a compact chair that converts into a bed. It’s soft and lounge-friendly, and the fold-out design makes it easy to switch from chair to sleeper in seconds — perfect for small spaces or guest use.
        Comfort is good for relaxing or occasional sleep, and the included pillows help with back and neck support. It’s especially nice if you like low, floor-style seating.
        The downsides: the seat sits pretty low to the ground and the fabric can run a bit warm. It’s also really meant for one person, not a full couch replacement.
        Overall: Great budget pick for dorms, gaming corners, or occasional guests — just don’t expect full sofa comfort or heavy-duty daily sleeping.
        阅读更多

      • angelle
        5.0 颗星，最多 5 颗星 Worth the price and serves its purpose
        2026年3月22日在美国发布评论
        尺寸: 單人座颜色: 米色已确认购买
        Item was as described. Filled out quickly and has stayed firm for the 3 months we have used it.No smell. Mostly sturdy but dips when sitting on edges only. It can seat 2 children comfortably or one adult. My 10 year old daughter uses as a chair in her room and then utilizes it for sleepovers. Many have commented on how comfortable it is. We got it in white and the color is as expected.

      • Alyssa
        4.0 颗星，最多 5 颗星 Nice couch
        2026年2月10日在美国发布评论
        尺寸: 單人座颜色: 黑色已确认购买
        I bought this as a college student in case I have guests sleeping over. It's a good size and is very easy to assemble both ways. I find it comfortable to sit on, but my friend said that she had found it a bit uncomfortable to sleep on because of the indents on the couch. However, she has a sleeping bag that she puts on top of it and it fills in the spaces. She sleeps very well once that's done. Aside from that I think it's a really nice touch in the room when I have people coming over.

        Bought this when we needed it for my son for a quick sleep over. It’s so comfortable, and easy to fold and unfold. It’s been a favorite seat around the kids room and basement. But it’s quite heavy! I also swore it said washable…but the covers do not come off, so take that for what you will.

      • Deirdre Mitacek
        3.0 颗星，最多 5 颗星 Perfect for sleepover
        2026年3月13日在美国发布评论
        尺寸: 單人座颜色: 粉红色已确认购买
        This is a substantial piece of furniture. Easy to assemble, you take it out of the box and unwrap it and it puffs up to full size. Be warned the box is heavy. As a bed it is a nice size and comfortable. As a chair/seating, it’s a little low to the ground. But perfect for a sleepover. The only downside I’ve noticed after several uses is that the decorative buttons pop off very easily. We’ve already lost three. It doesn’t affect the use but it does change the quality of the look. Also, the pink was very pink—it’s not a soft shade of pink.

        Exactly as described, but it is a very hard "mattress" if you want to use it unfolded for sleeping.       其他卖家

      关于此商品

      • 多功能折叠沙发床:折叠沙发床既可作为舒适的沙发,又可作为方便的床,非常适合小空间或客房使用。 可折叠设计,节省空间。 适合阅读、看电视、玩视频游戏或午睡
      • 头枕和腰枕:头枕和腰枕套装旨在提供卓越的舒适和支撑,无论坐着还是躺着,都能提供奢华的体验。 头枕采用绑带和搭扣设计,确保安全稳定地固定在折叠沙发上,有效防止任何不必要的移位或移位。 腰枕支撑下背部的自然曲线,缓解长时间坐着时的不适感
      • 【舒适的泡沫碎片填充物】垫子采用碎泡沫填充,精心制作,为您提供卓越的舒适度和支撑力。 这款创新的填充物可贴合您的身体轮廓,提供个性化的缓冲,缓解压力点,促进放松
      • 耐用面料:采用优质有线面料制成,这种材料提供独特的视觉和触觉体验,提升您的生活空间。 折叠沙发床的尺寸约为33.5英寸 x 74.8英寸 (约83.9 厘米 x 194.8 厘米),为一人提供舒适的座椅或床。
      • 重要提示:椅子床采用压缩和真空密封,以减少运输过程中的空间和二氧化碳排放。 打开包装后,让沙发床呼吸 48 小时,以恢复原来的形状和尺寸

      商品描述

      MAXYOYO折叠沙发床 可转换睡椅 带枕头可折叠床垫带靠背 便携式折叠椅床 舒适地板沙发休息室 客厅卧室 深灰 单人床
